description: ZSORT gap detection flags sequence anomalies in iOS CoreData records
steps: Create a ChatStorage fixture where ZWAMESSAGE ZSORT values skip from 10 to 50
Assert ExtractionResult.forensic_warnings contains SelectiveDeletion for that chat

description: iOS column ordering is resolved via PRAGMA table_info, not hardcoded indices
steps: Create a ChatStorage where column order differs from expected (simulate old iOS WA version)
Assert extraction still produces correct Message fields
